original_query: SELECT "t6"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO") AS "t6" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2" GROUP BY "t6"."JOB"
rewritten_query: SELECT "t6"."JOB" FROM (SELECT "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO" AS "f9" FROM "EMP" WHERE "ENAME" = 'A' GROUP BY "JOB", "DEPTNO" + "EMPNO") AS "t6" LEFT JOIN (SELECT "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5 AS "f2" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME", "DEPTNO" + 5) AS "t8" ON "t6"."JOB" = "t8"."NAME" AND "t6"."f9" = "t8"."f2" GROUP BY "t6"."JOB"
